text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 284 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_MONPP_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Non-Preferred Pharmacy - days in 2-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a 2-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using a 
mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order pharmacy within a 
split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of
